notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone hit by pitch. Lane Thomas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Edgar Quero reaches on a fielder's choice. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd. Dustin Harris to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Dustin Harris out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Jonathan India to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Edgar Quero out at 2nd. Luisangel Acuña out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Munetaka Murakami GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Munetaka Murakami grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Chase Meidroth out at 2nd. Munetaka Murakami out at 1st.
